system_prompt:
You are Hermes Agent, an intelligent AI assistant created by Nous Research. You are helpful, knowledgeable, and direct. You assist users with a wide range of tasks including answering questions, writing and editing code, analyzing information, creative work, and executing actions via your tools. You communicate clearly, admit uncertainty when appropriate, and prioritize being genuinely useful over being verbose unless otherwise directed below. Be targeted and efficient in your exploration and investigations.

Conversation started: Sunday, April 12, 2026 01:31 PM
Model: anthropic/claude-opus-4.6
Provider: openrouter

You are on a text messaging communication platform, Telegram. Please do not use markdown as it does not render. You can send media files natively: to deliver a file to the user, include MEDIA:/absolute/path/to/file in your response. Images (.png, .jpg, .webp) appear as photos, audio (.ogg) sends as voice bubbles, and videos (.mp4) play inline. You can also include image URLs in markdown format ![alt](url) and they will be sent as native photos.

messages.content: Research current Google Gemini model names and pricing as of April 2025+. I need: model name/ID exactly as used in API calls, input price per 1M tokens, output price per 1M tokens. Focus on: Gemini 2.5 Pro, Gemini 2.5 Flash, Gemini 2.0 Flash, Gemini 1.5 Pro, and any newer models. Check https://ai.google.dev/pricing or https://cloud.google.com/vertex-ai/generative-ai/pricing

I'll research Google Gemini pricing by checking their official pricing pages.

</tool_result>Here is a complete summary of Google Gemini model pricing as of April 2025, sourced directly from https://ai.google.dev/pricing:

GEMINI MODEL PRICING (Pay-as-you-go, per 1M tokens)

GEMINI 2.5 PRO
API model ID: gemini-2.5-pro-preview-03-25
Prompts ≤200k tokens:
  Input: $1.25/1M tokens
  Output (non-thinking): $10.00/1M tokens
  Output (thinking): $10.00/1M tokens
Prompts >200k tokens:
  Input: $2.50/1M tokens
  Output (non-thinking): $15.00/1M tokens
  Output (thinking): $15.00/1M tokens
Note: No free tier. Rate limit: 1,000 RPM, 2,500,000 TPM.

GEMINI 2.5 FLASH
API model ID: gemini-2.5-flash-preview-04-17
Prompts ≤200k tokens:
  Input: $0.15/1M tokens
  Output (non-thinking): $0.60/1M tokens
  Output (thinking): $3.50/1M tokens
Prompts >200k tokens: same prices
Has free tier available.

GEMINI 2.0 FLASH
API model ID: gemini-2.0-flash
  Input: $0.10/1M tokens
  Output: $0.40/1M tokens
Has free tier available.

GEMINI 2.0 FLASH-LITE
API model ID: gemini-2.0-flash-lite
  Input: $0.075/1M tokens
  Output: $0.30/1M tokens

GEMINI 1.5 PRO
API model ID: gemini-1.5-pro
Prompts ≤128k tokens:
  Input: $1.25/1M tokens
  Output: $5.00/1M tokens
Prompts >128k tokens:
  Input: $2.50/1M tokens
  Output: $10.00/1M tokens

GEMINI 1.5 FLASH
API model ID: gemini-1.5-flash
Prompts ≤128k tokens:
  Input: $0.075/1M tokens
  Output: $0.30/1M tokens
Prompts >128k tokens:
  Input: $0.15/1M tokens
  Output: $0.60/1M tokens

GEMINI 1.5 FLASH-8B
API model ID: gemini-1.5-flash-8b
Prompts ≤128k tokens:
  Input: $0.0375/1M tokens
  Output: $0.15/1M tokens
Prompts >128k tokens:
  Input: $0.075/1M tokens
  Output: $0.30/1M tokens

Key notes:
- There is also a free experimental model ID for 2.5 Pro: gemini-2.5-pro-exp-03-25 (free tier only, 5 RPM)
- Gemini 2.5 Flash and 2.5 Pro have separate "thinking" vs "non-thinking" output pricing
- No files were created; this is a research-only task
- Data sourced from the official ai.google.dev/pricing page
messages.reasoning: Let me research the current Google Gemini model names and pricing. I'll fetch the pricing pages to get the most accurate information.I now have comprehensive pricing data from the official Google AI for Developers pricing page. Let me compile this into a clear summary.
